specs.prompt: Build the first runnable preview of a next-generation full-stack monorepo starter. Do not ask follow-up questions. The preview must visibly include a Next.js app-router/RSC web app, shared tRPC API, edge-ready database layer using Kysely plus Prisma schema management, PlanetScale-style database status, Clerk-style auth, shadcn-style UI blocks, Expo mobile workspace notes, and a monorepo health panel.

Create a complete TypeScript library monorepo starter, not a marketing page. It must include package metadata, workspace setup, a core library entrypoint, strict tsconfig, a build script, tests, changeset/release notes, and a tiny Prisma generator example that shows how generated enums or types can reduce bundle size.

Create a runnable TypeScript CLI tool that scaffolds good project defaults. It should use an interactive prompt, let users select ESLint plus Prettier, VS Code settings and recommended extensions, strict TSConfig, and GitHub Actions CI with pnpm caching. Include the bin entry, CLI source, template writers, and an example generated workflow.

Create a TypeScript monorepo of agent workflow tools. It must include one package that acts as a Vite plugin for Convex and gives each coding agent an isolated environment, plus another package that behaves like an Oxlint plugin detecting unused Convex functions left behind by AI agents. Include package files, source files, example usage, and short safety notes.

Create an unofficial Python SDK package for a file-upload service. It must include pyproject metadata, an async UTApi client with list_files and delete_file, typed models, a FastAPI route-handler adapter, CORS example, environment variable usage, and a quickstart script.

Build a runnable demo for a theme kit that makes TanStack Start-style apps easy to theme. The preview must include a ThemeProvider concept, light/dark/system toggle, SSR-safe initial script explanation, localStorage persistence, CSS variables, route cards, and install snippets for npm, JSR, and Deno.

Create a VS Code extension that auto-fixes Tailwind CSS canonical class suggestions on save. It must listen to Tailwind CSS IntelliSense diagnostics shaped like 'The class ... can be written as ...', replace the class before save, expose a tailwindCanonicalClasses.fixOnSave setting, and include extension package metadata.

Build a runnable kanban board preview inspired by bleeding-edge full-stack TypeScript. It must visibly include Trellix-style columns, draggable-looking task cards, tRPC procedure/status panel, Auth.js session area, Turso/libSQL database status, realtime activity, and setup reminders for TURSO_URL, TURSO_ACCESS_TOKEN, and AUTH_SECRET.

Build a runnable demo of a tRPC React form suite. Do not ask follow-up questions. The preview must visibly include a contact form wired to a tRPC mutation with field-level Zod validation and inline error messages, a loading spinner on submission, optimistic update feedback that briefly shows the item before the server confirms, a refreshing query list below the form, and a code panel showing the tRPC router definition alongside the React form component.

followUps.label: add-file-upload-field
followUps.prompt: Add a file upload field to the form that validates file type and size using Zod before submitting.

specs.prompt: Build a runnable Next.js URL-based filter pattern demo. Do not ask follow-up questions. The preview must visibly include a product list that reads all filter and sort state from URL search params, a filter sidebar with category checkboxes, a price range slider, and a sort order dropdown, a deep-link share button that copies the current URL, a reset filters button, a result count badge, and a notes panel explaining the nuqs or useSearchParams approach and why it beats useState for shareable links.

followUps.label: add-pagination-param
followUps.prompt: Add a page number to the URL params so pagination state is also shareable via link.

specs.prompt: Build the first runnable preview of a Convex and BetterAuth full-stack starter. Do not ask follow-up questions. The preview must visibly include a sign-in and sign-up panel using BetterAuth session handling, a Convex real-time data dashboard showing live query results, an auth-gated feature area that reveals only when signed in, a session token display, environment variable setup notes covering CONVEX_URL and BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, and a connection status badge per service.

followUps.label: add-role-based-gate
followUps.prompt: Add an admin-only panel that is gated by a role field on the BetterAuth session, showing a permission denied state for regular users.

specs.prompt: Build the first runnable preview of a TanStack Start app with Convex and WorkOS AuthKit. Do not ask follow-up questions. The preview must visibly include a TanStack Start file-based router setup diagram, a WorkOS AuthKit login panel, a Convex live data dashboard with a real-time message feed, environment variable notes for WORKOS_API_KEY and CONVEX_URL, a TanStack Query integration status card, and a session display showing the authenticated user with a role badge.

Build the first runnable preview of a complete T3 stack reference app with every feature wired up. Do not ask follow-up questions. The preview must visibly include an app-router Next.js layout, an Auth.js session panel with sign-in and sign-out, tRPC query and mutation examples with loading states, a Prisma schema diagram, shadcn-style UI components, a feature checklist marking what is included versus still needs configuration, and environment variable notes for DATABASE_URL, NEXTAUTH_SECRET, and NEXTAUTH_URL.

followUps.label: add-stripe-integration
followUps.prompt: Add a Stripe integration card to the feature checklist with a basic webhook event log and checkout session example.
